nasb.text: They shall be joined with you and attend to the obligations of the tent of meeting, for all the service of the tent; but an outsider may not come near you.

esv.text: They shall join you and keep guard over the tent of meeting for all the service of the tent, and no outsider shall come near you.

cnv.text: 他們要與你聯合，也要守會幕的本分，辦理會幕的一切事務；只是外人不可走近你們。

ccb.text: 他们要协助你，负责看守圣幕，办理圣幕的一切事务。外人不可靠近。
